title: Nozin’ Aroun’
description: A programme for young adults, made by young adults, concentrating on all the subjects that young adults are interested in, like unemployment.
quote: When will the government realise that young adults are responsible people?
altHero: host Baz giving a thumbs up, surrounded by young adults dancing
alt1: host Maggie up in the rafters
alt2: Baz dancing with an older gentleman
alt3: a young Black man giving an interview
alt4: a young white man giving an interview
